Off Calendar May-08-2006 Continued To May-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing as guardian ad litem for Joseph Woldu. Gregory O'Keeffe appearing for and with Thomas Benson, trustee. Jeffrey Hudsen specially appearing by phone for Travler's Indemity. Mr. Benson informs the court that only the $20,000.00 promissory note is missing. Mr. Hudsen agrees to respond to a written demand. Mr. O'Keeffe will file an amended petition by 5/22. Matter is continued to 5/22. If amended petition is on file, no appearance is required. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petn. For Order Surcharging Surety Of Former Trustee & His Bonding Company
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Continued To May-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Gregory O'Keeffe appearing for Thomas Benson, trustee. Caroline Hinshaw appearing as guardian ad litem for Joseph Woldu. Jeffrey Hudsen specially appearing for Traveler's Indemity as successor to Gulf Insurance. Gulf Insurance's record did not show a bond was issued. There was an application for a bond. Court questioned why there was a bill for a bond premium from Gulf Insurance. Court wants Mr. Benson to file an itemized statement and try to resolve the issue with the bond. Ex parte petition to dispose with notice to Mr. Woldu is granted. Order signed in open court. Matter is continued to 5/8. Mr. Hudson can appear by phone. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
